hero.title: Learning
hero.subtitle: Beyond All Boundaries
hero.description: AI-personalized learning paths, modern integrated IDE with automated grading, and detailed progress reports help students develop 300% potential in the shortest time.

showcase.title: Experience the Ecosystem
showcase.subtitle: Discover the standout features that make LearnWell a trusted companion on your learning journey.

gallery.title: Code Gallery
gallery.description: Explore thousands of creative projects from the community. Learn from quality code and share your achievements.
gallery.preview: Browse web projects, games, and AI apps built by talented students.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Fair Elo ranking system. Compete, rank up, and establish your position in the programming community.
leaderboard.preview: Track your position and those of top players in the Real-time leaderboard.

forum.title: Forum
forum.description: The place to answer all programming questions. Enthusiastic community support, quickly resolving technical issues.
forum.preview: Join discussions, ask questions, and share experiences with experts.

blog.title: Tech Blog
blog.description: Update on the latest technology trends, in-depth tutorials, and inspiring stories.
blog.preview: Read quality articles on AI, Web Dev, Data Science, and many other fascinating topics.

features.title: Comprehensive Solution for Everyone
features.subtitle: Specialized tools for students, teachers, and parents - all connected in one ecosystem.

aiPath.title: AI Personalized Path
aiPath.desc: AI analyzes strengths/weaknesses and suggests suitable exercises for each student.

competition.title: Competition & Ranking
competition.desc: Join the Coding Arena, accumulate ELO, and rank up in the community.

autoPortfolio.title: Auto Portfolio
autoPortfolio.desc: System automatically aggregates projects and certificates into a professional portfolio.

autoGrading.title: Automated Grading
autoGrading.desc: AI grades code instantly with detailed feedback, saving 80% of time.

skillAnalysis.title: Skill Analysis
skillAnalysis.desc: Visual dashboard tracks progress for each student and class in real-time.

aiLectures.title: Create AI Lectures
aiLectures.desc: Interactive lesson tool with built-in video, code editor, and quizzes.

realtimeTracking.title: Real-time Tracking
realtimeTracking.desc: Instantly see projects completed, scores, and daily study time.

weeklyReports.title: Weekly Reports
weeklyReports.desc: Receive summary emails of skills, strengths, and areas for improvement.

familyActivities.title: Family Activities
familyActivities.desc: Suggested projects and challenges for parents to learn with their children at home.

cta.title: Ready to break boundaries with LearnWell?
cta.description: Join +1,200 students and +40 teachers optimizing their educational experience with the leading personalized platform.
cta.footerNote: No commitment • Always free for individuals • 24/7 Support

about.title: About LearnWell
about.description: LearnWell is an intelligent learning platform using AI to personalize education for every student. We believe that every child has exceptional potential if they learn in a way that suits them. With advanced technology and a dedicated educational team, we are changing the way learning happens in Vietnam.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become the leading AI educational platform in Vietnam, helping 1 million students develop thinking and programming skills to be ready for the digital future.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide free AI tools that help teachers teach more effectively, students learn the right way, and parents track their child's progress transparently and scientifically.

footer.description: A smart AI-driven educational platform designed to help students break boundaries and optimize their personal potential through personalized learning paths.

newsletter.note: Get notified about the latest contests & materials.
